entries.statement: Skill in communicating data and AI strategy, risk posture, and investment priorities to board-level and C-suite audiences using financial and business terms rather than technical language.
Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, translating business priorities into data and AI capability requirements with measurable outcomes.

Skill in designing and running data stewardship programs, including steward selection, training, responsibility definition, ownership and accountability assignment, service level agreements, and performance measurement.

Skill in building, managing, and operating a Data Governance Council, including membership design, decision authority, meeting cadence, agenda management, issue escalation, decision documentation, and multi-stakeholder conflict resolution.
Skill in measuring and reporting data governance program effectiveness using maturity scores, policy compliance rates, issue resolution metrics, and stewardship participation rates.
Skill in authoring and maintaining business glossary definitions, data dictionaries, and data asset documentation that are clear and accurate for both technical and business audiences.
Skill in developing actionable data and AI strategy recommendations, including prioritized roadmaps, capability investment plans, and organizational design recommendations.
